name: Section Brief
description: Writing instructions from Plotwright to Scene Smith for drafting a specific section. Defines goal, beats, choice intents, and expected outcomes. Section Briefs are the bridge between Story Spark (structure) and Scene Weave (prose). They remain in Hot as working documents and are not exported to players.

fields.name: section_title
fields.description: Human-readable title for the section being planned

fields.name: target_anchor
fields.description: Anchor ID for the section this brief describes (e.g., anchor005)

fields.name: topology_context
fields.description: Structural context: Hub, Loop, Gateway, or Linear

fields.name: goal
fields.description: What this section accomplishes narratively (1-2 sentences)

fields.name: key_beats
fields.description: 2-4 story moments that must appear in the prose, in sequence

fields.name: choice_intents
fields.description: Contrastive choices with their intents and targets

properties.name: intent
properties.description: Clear verb + object describing what player does

properties.name: target_anchor
properties.description: Anchor ID this choice leads to

properties.name: outcome_difference
properties.description: How this path differs from sibling choices

properties.name: gate
properties.description: Diegetic condition if gated (empty if ungated)

fields.name: expected_outcomes
fields.description: What the player should understand after reading this section (player-safe, no spoilers)

fields.name: open_questions
fields.description: Questions needing clarification from Lore, Style, or Curator before drafting

properties.name: resolved
properties.description: Whether this question has been answered

properties.name: micro_context
properties.description: Immediate reflection needed when converging from multiple paths

states.name: Draft
states.description: Brief is being written by Plotwright

states.name: Ready
states.description: Brief is complete and ready for Scene Smith

states.name: In Use
states.description: Scene Smith is actively drafting the section

states.name: Archived
states.description: Section has been completed and merged to Cold
